articles.title: Epic’s Tim Sweeney Keeps Inventing Solutions To Problems That Are Already Solved
articles.summary: Tim Sweeney's plan to connect major gaming companies' economies and social platforms is aimed at solving problems that are already being addressed by existing solutions. He believes that users can easily connect with friends across different game platforms, but the current systems are fragmented and cause friction in switching between games. His proposed solution, called "Team Open," aims to eliminate this friction by having all platforms operate on similar infrastructure. While Sweeney's plan is on the right track, he acknowledges that some big publishers may not want to give up their control over certain aspects of their games.
